content:
You are an ontology engineer working on a project to develop a new ontology
for a domain of interest. You have been tasked with developing the ontology
and ensuring that it is aligned with the requirements of the domain experts. 
You will focus on ontology creation.

A competency question (CQ) is a question that can be answered using the
knowledge represented in an ontology. Competency questions are used in
requirement engineering to determine the scope and coverage of an ontology and
to evaluate its effectiveness. Competency questions are typically formulated in
natural language and are used to test the ontology's ability to provide answers
to specific queries. Competency questions are an important part of the ontology
development process as they help to ensure that the ontology is fit for purpose
and meets the needs of its users.


Examples of competency questions for an ontology about music metadata include:
Which is the composer of a musical piece?
Is the composer of a musical piece known?
Which are the members of a music ensemble?
Which role a music artist played within a music ensemble?
In which time interval has a music artist been a member of a music ensemble?
Where was a music ensemble formed?
Which award was a music artist nominated for?
Which award was received by a music artist?
Which music artists has a music artist been influenced by?
Which music artist has a music artist collaborated with?
Which is the start date of the activity of a music artist?
Which is the end date of the activity of a music artist?
Which is the name of a music artist?
Which is the alias of a music artist?
Which is the language of the name/alias of a music artist?
Which music dataset has a music algorithm been trained on?
Which is the process that led to the creation of a musical piece?
In which time interval did the creation process took place?
Where did the creation process took place?
Which are the creative actions composing the creation process of a musical piece?
Which task was executed by a creative action?
Which are the parts of a musical piece?
Which collection is a musical piece member of?
Where was a musical piece performed?
When was a musical piece performed?
Which music artists took part to a musical performance?
Which is the recording process that recorded a musical performance?
Which is the recording produced by a recording process?


Given the schema definition below, extract all the competency questions that
can be answered as if the corresponding ontology was already implemented.
For each competency question, make sure it expresses a requirement that is supported or addressed by the schema.
Do not repeat any competency questions that have already been generated in previous responses or are present in the chat history.

Generate around 100 competency questions.
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- edited with XMLSPY v2004 rel. 3 U (http://www.xmlspy.com) by Burkhard Schaefer (BSSN Software) -->
<xsd:schema targetNamespace="urn:org:astm:animl:schema:core:draft:0.90" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ds="http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#" xmlns="urn:org:astm:animl:schema:core:draft:0.90" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" version="0.90">
	<!-- $Id$ -->
	<xsd:import namespace="http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#" schemaLocation="http://www.w3.org/TR/xmldsig-core/xmldsig-core-schema.xsd"/>
	<!--Root-Node of every AnIML document-->
	<xsd:element name="AnIML" type="AnIMLType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Root Element for AnIML documents.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:key name="sampleID">
			<xsd:selector xpath="SampleSet/Sample"/>
			<xsd:field xpath="@sampleID"/>
		</xsd:key>
		<xsd:keyref name="sampleIDUsage" refer="sampleID">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>An ExperimentStep may only reference samples which are actually declared in the SampleSet section of the document.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:selector xpath=".//ExperimentStep/SampleReferenceSet/SampleReference"/>
			<xsd:field xpath="@sampleID"/>
		</xsd:keyref>
		<xsd:unique name="experimentStepID">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>If an ExperimentStep carries an experimentStepID attribute, its value must be unique across the entire document.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:selector xpath=".//ExperimentStep"/>
			<xsd:field xpath="@experimentStepID"/>
		</xsd:unique>
		<xsd:keyref name="experimentStepIDUsage" refer="experimentStepID">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>An ExperimentDataReference may only reference ExperimentSteps that carry a valid experimentStepID.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:selector xpath=".//ExperimentStep/ExperimentDataReferenceSet/ExperimentDataReference"/>
			<xsd:field xpath="@experimentStepID"/>
		</xsd:keyref>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="AnIMLType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>ComplexType for the root element of an AnIML document.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="SampleSet" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="ExperimentStepSet" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="AuditTrailEntrySet" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="SignatureSet" minOccurs="0"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attribute name="version" type="ShortStringType" use="required" fixed="0.90">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Version number of the AnIML Core Schema used in this document. Must be "0.90".</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<!-- -->
	<!--Top-Level document elements-->
	<xsd:element name="SampleSet" type="SampleSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for Samples used in this AnIML document.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="SampleSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for Samples used in this AnIML document.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Sample" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="ExperimentStepSet" type="ExperimentStepSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for multiple ExperimentSteps that describe the process and results.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:key name="seriesID">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Every Series ID must be unique within a SeriesSet.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:selector xpath=".//Series"/>
			<xsd:field xpath="@seriesID"/>
		</xsd:key>
		<xsd:keyref name="seriesIDRef" refer="seriesID">
			<xsd:selector xpath=".//ExperimentStep/ParentDataPointReference"/>
			<xsd:field xpath="@seriesID"/>
		</xsd:keyref>
		<xsd:key name="templateID">
			<xsd:selector xpath="./Template"/>
			<xsd:field xpath="@templateID"/>
		</xsd:key>
		<xsd:keyref name="templateUsedRef" refer="templateID">
			<xsd:selector xpath="./ExperimentStep"/>
			<xsd:field xpath="@templateUsed"/>
		</xsd:keyref>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ExperimentStepSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for multiple ExperimentSteps that describe the process and results.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Template" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
			<xsd:element ref="ExperimentStep" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="AuditTrailEntrySet" type="AuditTrailEntrySetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for audit trail entries describing changes to this document.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="AuditTrailEntrySetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for audit trail entries describing changes to this document.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="AuditTrailEntry" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="SignatureSet" type="SignatureSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for digital signatures covering parts of this AnIML document.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="SignatureSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for digital signatures covering parts of this AnIML document.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Signature" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<!-- -->
	<!--SampleSet information-->
	<xsd:element name="Sample" type="SampleType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual Sample, referenced from other parts of this AnIML document.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="SampleType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual Sample, referenced from other parts of this AnIML document.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="TagSet" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Category" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItemWithName"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="sampleID" type="ShortTokenType" use="required"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="barcode" type="ShortTokenType" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Value of barcode label that is attached to sample container.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="comment" type="ShortStringType" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Unstructured text comment to further describe the Sample.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="derived" type="xsd:boolean" use="optional" default="false">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Indicates whether this is a derived Sample. A derived Sample is a Sample that has been created by applying a Technique. (Sub-Sampling, Processing, ...)</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="containerType" type="ContainerTypeType" use="optional" default="simple">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Whether this sample is also a container for other samples. Set to "simple" if not.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="containerID" type="ShortTokenType" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Sample ID of container in which this sample is located.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="locationInContainer" type="ShortTokenType" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Coordinates of this sample within the enclosing container. In case of microplates or trays, the row is identified by letters and the column is identified by numbers (1-based) while in landscape orientation. Examples: A10 = 1st row, 10th column, Z1 = 26th row, 1st column, AB2 = 28th row, 2nd column.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SourceDataLocation"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:simpleType name="ContainerTypeType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Describes what kind of container the current sample is.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType">
			<xsd:enumeration value="simple">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>This container holds exactly one sample (e.g. well, vial, tube).</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="determinate">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Positions within this container are precisely defined and known in advance (e.g. racks, ...)</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="indeterminate">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Positions within this container are not precisely defined or known in advance (e.g. gels, surfaces)</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="rectangular tray">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Rectangular tray with unknown (or other) number of positions.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="6 wells">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Microtiter plate or tray with 6 positions.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="24 wells">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Microtiter plate or tray with 24 positions.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="96 wells">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Microtiter plate or tray with 96 positions.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="384 wells">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Microtiter plate or tray with 384 positions.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="1536 wells">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Microtiter plate or tray with 1536 positions.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<!-- -->
	<!--Elements representing process information and data-->
	<xsd:element name="ExperimentStep" type="ExperimentStepType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container that documents a step in an experiment. Use one ExperimentStep per application of a Technique.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ExperimentStepType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container that documents a step in an experiment. Use one ExperimentStep per application of a Technique.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="TagSet" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Technique" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Infrastructure" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Method" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Result" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItemWithName"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="experimentStepID" type="ShortTokenType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Unique identifier for this ExperimentStep. Used to point to this step from an ExperimentDataReference.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="templateUsed" type="ShortTokenType" use="optional"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="comment" type="ShortStringType" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Unstructured text comment to further describe the ExperimentStep.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SourceDataLocation"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="Template" type="TemplateType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Represents a template for an ExperimentStep.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="TemplateType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Represents a template for an ExperimentStep.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="TagSet" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Technique" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Infrastructure" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Method" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Result" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItemWithName"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="templateID" type="ShortTokenType" use="required"/>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SourceDataLocation"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="Timestamp" type="TimestampType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Date and time of modification.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="TimestampType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Date and time of modification.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:dateTime"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Method" type="MethodType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Describes how this Experiment was performed.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="MethodType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Describes how this Experiment was performed.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Author" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Device" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Software" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Category" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="name" type="ShortTokenType" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Optional method name, as defined in the instrument software.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="Infrastructure" type="InfrastructureType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Contains references to the context of this Experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="InfrastructureType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Contains references to the context of this Experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="SampleReferenceSet" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="ParentDataPointReferenceSet" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="ExperimentDataReferenceSet" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Timestamp" minOccurs="0"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="SampleReferenceSet" type="SampleReferenceSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Set of Samples used in this Experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="SampleReferenceSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Set of Samples used in this Experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="SampleReference" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
			<xsd:element ref="SampleInheritance" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<!-- -->
	<!--Technique related information-->
	<xsd:element name="Technique" type="TechniqueType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to Technique Definition used in this Experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="TechniqueType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to Technique Definition used in this Experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Extension" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
			<!--			<xsd:element name="Extension" type="ExtensionType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> -->
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItemWithName"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="uri" type="xsd:anyURI" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>URI where Technique Definition file can be fetched.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="sha256" type="xsd:token" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>SHA256 checksum of the referenced Technique Definition. Hex encoded, lower cased. Similar to the output of the sha256 unix command.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="Extension" type="ExtensionType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to an Extension to amend the active Technique Definition.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ExtensionType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to an Extension to amend the active Technique Definition.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attribute name="uri" type="xsd:anyURI" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>URI where Extension file can be fetched.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="name" type="ShortTokenType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Name of Extension to be used. Must match Name given in Extension Definition file.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="sha256" type="xsd:token" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>SHA256 checksum of the referenced Extension. Hex encoded, lower cased. Similar to the output of the sha256 unix command.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<!---->
	<!--ParentDataPointReferenceSet related information-->
	<xsd:element name="ParentDataPointReferenceSet" type="ParentDataPointReferenceSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Contains references to the parent Result.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ParentDataPointReferenceSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Contains references to the parent Result.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="ParentDataPointReference" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="ParentDataPointReference" type="ParentDataPointReferenceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to a data point or value range in an independent Series in the parent Result.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ParentDataPointReferenceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to a data point or value range in an independent Series in the parent Result.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="StartValue"/>
			<xsd:element ref="EndValue" minOccurs="0"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="seriesID" type="ShortTokenType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Contains the ID of the Series referenced.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<!---->
	<!--SampleReferenceSet and ExperimentDataReferenceSet-->
	<xsd:simpleType name="PurposeType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Specifies the referenced entity is consumed or produced in an experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType">
			<xsd:enumeration value="produced">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Specifies whether a sample is produced in an experiment.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="consumed">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Specifies whether a sample is consumed in an experiment.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="SampleReference" type="SampleReferenceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to a Sample used in this Experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="SampleReferenceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to a Sample used in this Experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="sampleID" type="ShortTokenType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>SampleID of the Sample used in the current ExperimentStep. Refers to the sampleID within the SampleSet section of the document.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SampleAttributes"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="SampleInheritance" type="SampleInheritanceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Indicates that a Sample was inherited from the parent ExperimentStep.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="SampleInheritanceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Indicates that a Sample was inherited from the parent ExperimentStep.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SampleAttributes"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:simpleType name="SamplePurposeType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Specifies whether a sample is consumed or produced in an experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="PurposeType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:attributeGroup name="SampleAttributes">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Common attributes for sample references.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attribute name="role" type="ShortTokenType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Role this sample plays within the current ExperimentStep.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="samplePurpose" type="SamplePurposeType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Specifies whether the referenced sample is produced or consumed by the current ExperimentStep.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:attributeGroup>
	<xsd:element name="ExperimentDataReferenceSet" type="ExperimentDataReferenceSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Set of Experiment Steps consumed by this Experiment Step.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ExperimentDataReferenceSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Set of Experiment Steps consumed by this Experiment Step.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="ExperimentDataReference" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
			<xsd:element ref="ExperimentDataBulkReference" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="ExperimentDataReference" type="ExperimentDataReferenceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to an Experiment Step whose data are consumed.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ExperimentDataReferenceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to an Experiment Step whose data is consumed.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="ExperimentDataAttributes"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="experimentStepID" type="ShortTokenType" use="required"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="ExperimentDataBulkReference" type="ExperimentDataBulkReferenceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Prefix-based reference to a set of Experiment Steps whose data are consumed.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ExperimentDataBulkReferenceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Prefix-based reference to a set of Experiment Steps whose data are consumed.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="ExperimentDataAttributes"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="experimentStepIDPrefix" type="ShortTokenType" use="required"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:attributeGroup name="ExperimentDataAttributes">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Common attributes for experiment data references</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attribute name="role" type="ShortTokenType" use="required"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="dataPurpose" type="ExperimentDataPurposeType" use="required"/>
	</xsd:attributeGroup>
	<xsd:simpleType name="ExperimentDataPurposeType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Specifies whether the referenced ExperimentStep data is consumed or produced in an experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="PurposeType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<!-- -->
	<!--Result related information-->
	<xsd:element name="Result" type="ResultType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for Data derived from Experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ResultType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for Data derived from Experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="SeriesSet" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Category" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
			<xsd:element ref="ExperimentStepSet" minOccurs="0"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItemWithName"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="SeriesSet" type="SeriesSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for n-dimensional Data.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="SeriesSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for n-dimensional Data.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Series" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItemWithName"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="length" type="NonNegativeIntType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Number of data points each Series contains.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="Series" type="SeriesType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for multiple Values.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="SeriesType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Container for multiple Values.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:choice minOccurs="0">
				<xsd:element ref="IndividualValueSet" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
				<xsd:element ref="EncodedValueSet" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
				<xsd:element ref="AutoIncrementedValueSet" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
			</xsd:choice>
			<xsd:element ref="Unit" minOccurs="0"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItemWithName"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="dependency" type="DependencyType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Specified whether the Series is independent or dependent.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="seriesID" type="ShortTokenType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Identifies the Series. Used in References from subordinate ExperimentSteps. Unique per SeriesSet.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="visible" type="VisibleType" use="optional" default="true">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Specifies whether data in this Series is to be displayed to the user by default.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="plotScale" type="PlotScaleType" use="optional" default="linear">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Specifies whether the data in this Series is typically plotted on a linear or logarithmic scale.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="seriesType" type="SeriesTypeType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Data type used by all values in this Series.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="IndividualValueSet" type="IndividualValueSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Multiple Values explicitly specified.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="IndividualValueSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Multiple Values explicitly specified.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:complexContent>
			<xsd:extension base="UnboundedValueType">
				<xsd:attributeGroup ref="ValueSet"/>
			</xsd:extension>
		</xsd:complexContent>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="EncodedValueSet" type="EncodedValueSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Multiple numeric values encoded as a base64 binary string. Uses little-endian byte order.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="EncodedValueSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Multiple numeric values encoded as a base64 binary string. Uses little-endian byte order.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:simpleContent>
			<xsd:extension base="xsd:base64Binary">
				<xsd:attributeGroup ref="ValueSet"/>
			</xsd:extension>
		</xsd:simpleContent>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="StartValue" type="StartValueType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Lower boundary of an interval or ValueSet.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="StartValueType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Lower boundary of an interval or ValueSet.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:complexContent>
			<xsd:extension base="NumericValueType"/>
		</xsd:complexContent>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="EndValue" type="EndValueType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Upper boundary of an interval.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="EndValueType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Upper boundary of an interval.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:complexContent>
			<xsd:extension base="NumericValueType"/>
		</xsd:complexContent>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="Increment" type="IncrementType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Increment value</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="IncrementType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Increment value</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:complexContent>
			<xsd:extension base="NumericValueType"/>
		</xsd:complexContent>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="AutoIncrementedValueSet" type="AutoIncrementedValueSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Multiple values given in form of a start value and an increment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="AutoIncrementedValueSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Multiple values given in form of a start value and an increment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="StartValue"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Increment"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="ValueSet"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<!---->
	<!--Units-->
	<xsd:element name="Unit" type="UnitType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Definition of a Scientific Unit.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="UnitType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Definition of a Scientific Unit.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="SIUnit" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attribute name="label" type="LabelType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Defines the visual representation of a particular Unit.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="quantity" type="QuantityType" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Quantity the unit can be applied to</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:simpleType name="LabelType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>String representation of a particular Unit.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType">
			<xsd:minLength value="1"/>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:simpleType name="QuantityType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Quantity a Unit is applicable to.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType">
			<xsd:minLength value="1"/>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="SIUnit" type="SIUnitType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Combination of SI Units used to represent Scientific Unit.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="SIUnitType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Combination of SI Units used to represent Scientific unit</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:simpleContent>
			<xsd:extension base="SIUnitNameList">
				<xsd:attribute name="factor" type="xsd:double" use="optional" default="1"/>
				<xsd:attribute name="exponent" type="xsd:double" use="optional" default="1"/>
				<xsd:attribute name="offset" type="xsd:double" use="optional" default="0"/>
			</xsd:extension>
		</xsd:simpleContent>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:simpleType name="SIUnitNameList">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Names of all SI Units</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType">
			<xsd:enumeration value="1">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents a dimensionless unit.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="m">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents the SI unit "meter".</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="kg">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents the SI unit "kilogram".</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="s">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents the SI unit "second".</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="A">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents the SI unit "ampere".</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="K">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents the SI unit "kelvin".</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="mol">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents the SI unit "mol".</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="cd">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents the SI unit "candela".</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<!---->
	<!--AuditTrailEntry related information-->
	<xsd:element name="AuditTrailEntry" type="AuditTrailEntryType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Describes a set of changes made to the particular AnIML document by one user at a given time.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="AuditTrailEntryType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Describes a set of changes made to the particular AnIML document by one user at a given time.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Timestamp"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Author"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Software" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Action"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Reason" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Comment" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Diff" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Reference" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="Action" type="ActionType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Type of change made (created, modified, ...)</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="ActionType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Type of change made (created, modified, ...)</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType">
			<xsd:enumeration value="created">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>The given user has created the references item(s).</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="modified">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Item already existed and has been modified. Modifications are explained in the Description element.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="converted">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Item has been converted into AnIML format.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="read">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>The given user has exercised read access on the referenced item(s).</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="signed">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>The given user has attached a digital signature.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="deleted">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>The referenced items were deleted. No reference is specified. Description explains what was deleted.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Reason" type="ReasonType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Explanation why changes were made.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="ReasonType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Explanation why changes were made.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Comment" type="CommentType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Human-readable comment further explaining the changes.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="CommentType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Human-readable comment further explaining the changes.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Diff" type="DiffType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Machine-readable description of changes made.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="DiffType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Machine-readable description of changes made.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="OldValue"/>
			<xsd:element ref="NewValue"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attribute name="scope" type="ScopeType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Scope of diff. May be "element" or "attribute".</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="changedItem" type="xsd:IDREF" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>ID of the SignableItem that was changed</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:simpleType name="ScopeType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Scope of diff. May be "element" or "attribute".</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType">
			<xsd:enumeration value="element">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>This diff describes the whole element before and after the change.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="attributes">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>This diff only describes a change in attributes. The child elements remain unchanged (and are not reflected in the diff to save space).</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="OldValue" type="xsd:string">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Value before the change.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:element name="NewValue" type="xsd:string">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Value after the change.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:element name="Reference" type="ReferenceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>ID of the SignableItem that was affected. If none is specified, entire document is covered.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="ReferenceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>ID of the SignableItem that was affected. If none is specified, entire document is covered.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:IDREF"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Signature" type="ds:SignatureType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Digital Signature that has been applied to a part of this AnIML document. Uses the W3C XML-DSIG specification.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<!-- -->
	<!--Parameter related information-->
	<xsd:element name="Category" type="CategoryType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Defines a category of Parameters and SeriesSets. Used to model hierarchies.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="CategoryType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Defines a category of Parameters and SeriesSets. Used to model hierarchies.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Parameter" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
			<xsd:element ref="SeriesSet" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Category" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Contains multiple subcategories of Category.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:element>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItemWithName"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="Parameter" type="ParameterType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Name/Value Pair.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ParameterType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Name/Value Pair.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:complexContent>
			<xsd:extension base="SingleValueType">
				<xsd:sequence>
					<xsd:element ref="Unit" minOccurs="0"/>
				</xsd:sequence>
				<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItemWithName"/>
				<xsd:attribute name="parameterType" type="ParameterTypeType" use="required">
					<xsd:annotation>
						<xsd:documentation>Data type of this parameter</xsd:documentation>
					</xsd:annotation>
				</xsd:attribute>
			</xsd:extension>
		</xsd:complexContent>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<!-- -->
	<!--SimpleTypes for Series definitions-->
	<xsd:simpleType name="DependencyType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Specified whether the Series is independent or dependent.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType">
			<xsd:enumeration value="independent">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Specified that the Series is independent.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="dependent">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Specified that the Series is dependent.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:simpleType name="PlotScaleType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Specifies how the data in this Series is typically plotted.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType">
			<xsd:enumeration value="linear">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Specifies that this Series is typically plotted on a linear scale.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="log">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Specifies that this Series is typically plotted on a common logarithmic scale (base 10).</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="ln">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Specifies that this Series is typically plotted on a natural logarithmic scale (base e).</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="none">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Specifies that this Series is not plottable.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:simpleType name="VisibleType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Specifes whether a Series should be displayed by default.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:boolean"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<!-- -->
	<!--Complex Types for Parameter and Series values, Simple Types for Data Type names-->
	<xsd:complexType name="UnboundedValueType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Base type for all value elements for use in Series and parameters. To be restricted.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:choice maxOccurs="unbounded">
				<xsd:element ref="I"/>
				<xsd:element ref="L"/>
				<xsd:element ref="F"/>
				<xsd:element ref="D"/>
				<xsd:element ref="S"/>
				<xsd:element ref="Boolean"/>
				<xsd:element ref="DateTime"/>
				<xsd:element ref="PNG"/>
				<xsd:element ref="EmbeddedXML"/>
				<xsd:element ref="SVG"/>
			</xsd:choice>
		</xsd:sequence>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="I" type="Int32Type">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual integer value (32 bits, signed).</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="Int32Type">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual integer value (32 bits, signed).</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:int"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="L" type="Int64Type">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual long integer value (64 bits, signed).</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="Int64Type">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual long integer value (64 bits, signed).</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:long"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="F" type="Float32Type">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual 32-bit floating point value.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="Float32Type">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual 32-bit floating point value.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:float"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="D" type="Float64Type">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual 64-bit floating point value.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="Float64Type">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual 64-bit floating point value.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:double"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="S" type="StringType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual string value.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="StringType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual string value.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Boolean" type="BooleanType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual boolean value.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="BooleanType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual boolean value.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:boolean"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="DateTime" type="DateTimeType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual ISO date/time value.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="DateTimeType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual ISO date/time value.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:dateTime"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="PNG" type="PNGType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Base 64 encoded PNG image.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="PNGType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Base 64 encoded PNG image.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:base64Binary"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="EmbeddedXML" type="EmbeddedXMLType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Value governed by a different XML Schema.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="EmbeddedXMLType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Value governed by a different XML Schema.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="SVG" type="SVGType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Value governed by the SVG DTD. Used to represent vector graphic images.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="SVGType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Value governed by the SVG DTD. Used to represent vector graphic images.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction>
			<xsd:simpleType>
				<xsd:restriction base="EmbeddedXMLType"/>
			</xsd:simpleType>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:complexType name="SingleValueType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Elements for IndividualValueSets in Series.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:complexContent>
			<xsd:restriction base="UnboundedValueType">
				<xsd:sequence>
					<xsd:choice>
						<xsd:element ref="I"/>
						<xsd:element ref="L"/>
						<xsd:element ref="F"/>
						<xsd:element ref="D"/>
						<xsd:element ref="S"/>
						<xsd:element ref="Boolean"/>
						<xsd:element ref="DateTime"/>
						<xsd:element ref="PNG"/>
						<xsd:element ref="EmbeddedXML"/>
						<xsd:element ref="SVG"/>
					</xsd:choice>
				</xsd:sequence>
			</xsd:restriction>
		</xsd:complexContent>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:complexType name="NumericValueType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Elements for numeric Series values.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:complexContent>
			<xsd:restriction base="UnboundedValueType">
				<xsd:sequence>
					<xsd:choice>
						<xsd:element ref="I"/>
						<xsd:element ref="L"/>
						<xsd:element ref="F"/>
						<xsd:element ref="D"/>
					</xsd:choice>
				</xsd:sequence>
			</xsd:restriction>
		</xsd:complexContent>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:simpleType name="ParameterTypeType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Names of Data Types for Parameters</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType">
			<xsd:enumeration value="Int32">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents an individual integer value (32 bits, signed).</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="Int64">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents an individual long integer value (64 bits, signed).</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="Float32">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents an individual 32-bit floating point value.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="Float64">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents an individual 64-bit floating point value.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="String">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents an individual string value.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="Boolean">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents an individual Boolean value.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="DateTime">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents an individual ISO date/time value.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="EmbeddedXML">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Represents a Value governed by a different XML Schema..</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="PNG">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Base 64 encoded PNG image</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="SVG">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Value governed by the SVG DTD. Used to represent vector graphic images.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:simpleType name="SeriesTypeType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Names of Data Types for Series.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ParameterTypeType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<!-- -->
	<!--AttributeGroup for sparse data-->
	<xsd:attributeGroup name="ValueSet">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Start and End Index for this Set of Values (zero-based).</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attribute name="startIndex" type="NonNegativeIntType" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Zero-based index of the first entry in this Value Set. The specification is inclusive.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="endIndex" type="NonNegativeIntType" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Zero-based index of the last entry in this Value Set. The specification is inclusive.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:attributeGroup>
	<!---->
	<!--Stuff for digital signatures and audit trail-->
	<xsd:attributeGroup name="SignableItem">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>ID for Signable Items.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attribute name="id" type="xsd:ID" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Anchor point for digital signature. This identifier is referred to from the "Reference" element in a Signature. Unique per document.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:attributeGroup>
	<xsd:attributeGroup name="SignableItemWithName">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>ID and Name attribute for Signable Items.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attributeGroup ref="SignableItem"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="name" type="ShortTokenType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Plain-text name of this item.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:attributeGroup>
	<!---->
	<!--Things used for multiple purposes-->
	<xsd:simpleType name="UserTypeType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Specifies whether a user is a real person, a device, or a software program.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType">
			<xsd:enumeration value="human">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Specifies that the user is a real person.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="device">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Specifies that the user is a device.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
			<xsd:enumeration value="software">
				<xsd:annotation>
					<xsd:documentation>Specifies that the user is a software system.</xsd:documentation>
				</xsd:annotation>
			</xsd:enumeration>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:attributeGroup name="SourceDataLocation">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Attribute group which points to the original data source.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attribute name="sourceDataLocation" type="ShortStringType" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Points to the original data source. May be a file name, uri, database ID, etc.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:attributeGroup>
	<!-- -->
	<!--Tag Elements and Types-->
	<xsd:element name="TagSet" type="TagSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Set of Tag elements.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="TagSetType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Set of Tag elements.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Tag" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="Tag" type="TagType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Tag to mark related data items. When a value is given, it may also serve as a reference to an external data system.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="TagType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Tag to mark related data items. When a value is given, it may also serve as a reference to an external data system.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attribute name="name" type="ShortTokenType" use="required"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="value" type="ShortStringType" use="optional"/>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<!-- -->
	<!--Humans, Device and Software involved in recording the data-->
	<xsd:element name="Author" type="AuthorType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Information about a person, a device or a piece of software authoring AnIML files.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="AuthorType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Information about a person, a device or a piece of software authoring AnIML files.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Name"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Affiliation" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Role" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Email" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Phone" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Location" minOccurs="0"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attribute name="userType" type="UserTypeType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Type of user (human, device, software)</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="Name" type="NameType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Common name.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="NameType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Common name.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortStringType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Affiliation" type="AffiliationType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Organization the Author is affiliated with.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="AffiliationType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Organization the Author is affiliated with.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortStringType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Role" type="RoleType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Role the Author plays within the organization.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="RoleType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Role the Author plays within the organization.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortStringType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Email" type="EmailType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>RFC822-compliant email address.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="EmailType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>RFC822-compliant email address.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortStringType">
			<xsd:pattern value=".*@.*\..*"/>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Phone" type="PhoneType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Phone number.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="PhoneType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Phone number.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortStringType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Location" type="LocationType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Location or physical address.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="LocationType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Location or physical address.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortStringType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Device" type="DeviceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Device used to perform experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="DeviceType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Device used to perform experiment.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="DeviceIdentifier" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Manufacturer" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Name"/>
			<xsd:element ref="FirmwareVersion" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="SerialNumber" minOccurs="0"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="DeviceIdentifier" type="DeviceIdentifierType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Unique name or identifier of the device.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="DeviceIdentifierType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Unique name or identifier of the device.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Manufacturer" type="ManufacturerType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Company name.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="ManufacturerType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Company name.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="FirmwareVersion" type="FirmwareVersionType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Version identifier of firmware release.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="FirmwareVersionType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Version identifier of firmware release.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="SerialNumber" type="SerialNumberType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Unique serial number of device.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="SerialNumberType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Unique serial number of device.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Software" type="SoftwareType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Software used to author this.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="SoftwareType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Software used to author this.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Manufacturer" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Name"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Version" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="OperatingSystem" minOccurs="0"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="OperatingSystem" type="OperatingSystemType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Operating system the software was running on.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="OperatingSystemType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Operating system the software was running on.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:element name="Version" type="VersionType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Version identifier of software release.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:simpleType name="VersionType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Version identifier of software release.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="ShortTokenType"/>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<!---->
	<!--General purpose data types-->
	<xsd:simpleType name="ShortStringType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>String with up to 1024 characters</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
			<xsd:maxLength value="1024"/>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:simpleType name="ShortTokenType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Token with up to 1024 characters</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:token">
			<xsd:maxLength value="1024"/>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
	<xsd:simpleType name="NonNegativeIntType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Individual non-negative Integer Value (32 bits, signed)</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:restriction base="xsd:int">
			<xsd:minInclusive value="0"/>
		</xsd:restriction>
	</xsd:simpleType>
</xsd:schema>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- edited with XMLSPY v2004 rel. 3 U (http://www.xmlspy.com) by Burkhard Schaefer (BSSN Software) -->
<xsd:schema targetNamespace="urn:org:astm:animl:schema:technique:draft:0.90" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="urn:org:astm:animl:schema:technique:draft:0.90" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified">
	<!--XML Schema for AnIML Technique Definition files. -->
	<!-- -->
	<!-- * Top-Level document elements * -->
	<!-- ================== -->
	<xsd:element name="Technique" type="TechniqueType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>The root element of an AnIML Technique Definition document.  Techniques are typically categorized as either sample alteration, detection, or data post-processing.  Each document defines and constrains how ExperimentSteps and Sample definitions are to be filled for its respective technique in an AnIML document.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:unique name="sampleRoleName">
			<xsd:selector xpath="SampleRole"/>
			<xsd:field xpath="@name"/>
		</xsd:unique>
		<xsd:unique name="resultBlueprintName">
			<xsd:selector xpath="ResultBlueprint"/>
			<xsd:field xpath="@name"/>
		</xsd:unique>
		<xsd:unique name="literatureReferenceID">
			<xsd:selector xpath="Bibliography/LiteratureReference"/>
			<xsd:field xpath="@literatureReferenceID"/>
		</xsd:unique>
		<xsd:keyref name="literatureReferenceIDUsage" refer="literatureReferenceID">
			<xsd:selector xpath=".//Documentation"/>
			<xsd:field xpath="@literatureReferenceID"/>
		</xsd:keyref>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="TechniqueType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>The root element of an AnIML Technique Definition document.  Techniques are typically categorized as either sample alteration, detection, or data post-processing.  Each document defines and constrains how ExperimentSteps and Sample definitions are to be filled for its respective technique in an AnIML document.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Documentation" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="ExtensionScope" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="SampleRoleBlueprint" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
			<xsd:element ref="ExperimentDataRoleBlueprint" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
			<xsd:element ref="MethodBlueprint" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="ResultBlueprint" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
			<xsd:element ref="Bibliography" minOccurs="0"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attribute name="version" type="xsd:string" use="required" fixed="0.90">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Version number of the AnIML Technique Schema used in this document. Must be "0.90".</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="name" type="ShortTokenType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Technique Definition name (human-readable).</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="extension" type="xsd:boolean" use="optional" default="false">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Is this document an extension?  If false, it is a Technique Definition. If true, it is a Technique Extension.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="abstract" type="xsd:boolean" use="optional" default="false">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Whether this Technique Definition or Extension needs to be used with an Extension to be valid. If true, at least one non-abstract extension is required in the ExperimentStep.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<!---->
	<!--Extension scope related information-->
	<xsd:element name="ExtensionScope" type="ExtensionScopeType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>For Extensions only. Specifies which Technique Definitions or Extensions can be extended using this Extension.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ExtensionScopeType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>For Extensions only. Specifies which Technique Definitions or Extensions can be extended using this Extension.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="ExtendedTechnique" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
			<xsd:element ref="ExtendedExtension" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="ExtendedTechnique" type="ExtendedTechniqueType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to a Technique Definition which can be extended using this Extension.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ExtendedTechniqueType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to a Technique Definition which can be extended using this Extension.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attribute name="name" type="ShortTokenType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Name of Extension to be used. Must match Name given in Extension Definition file.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="uri" type="xsd:anyURI" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>URI where Technique Definition file can be fetched.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="sha256" type="xsd:token" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>SHA256 checksum of the referenced Technique Definition. Hex encoded, lower cased. Similar to the output of the sha256 unix command.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="ExtendedExtension" type="ExtendedExtensionType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to an Extension which can be extended using this Extension.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ExtendedExtensionType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Reference to an Extension which can be extended using this Extension.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:attribute name="name" type="ShortTokenType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Name of Extension to be used. Must match Name given in Extension Definition file.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="uri" type="xsd:anyURI" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>URI where Extension file can be fetched.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="sha256" type="xsd:token" use="optional">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>SHA256 checksum of the referenced Extension. Hex encoded, lower cased. Similar to the output of the sha256 unix command.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<!---->
	<!--Basic Layout of an Experiment Step-->
	<xsd:element name="SampleRoleBlueprint" type="SampleRoleBlueprintType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Definition of characteristics and role that the referenced Sample plays in the ExperimentStep.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="SampleRoleBlueprintType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Definition of characteristics and role that the referenced Sample plays in the ExperimentStep.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Documentation" minOccurs="0"/>
			<xsd:element ref="CategoryBlueprint" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attribute name="name" type="ShortTokenType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>SampleRole name used in the SampleReference element's role attribute.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="samplePurpose" type="PurposeType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Is the sample in this role produced or consumed by the Technique? (see SamplePurposeType).</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="modality" type="ModalityType" use="optional" default="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Is a sample in this role required?</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="maxOccurs" type="MaxOccursType" use="optional" default="1">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Specifies how many samples with this role may exist. In an AnIML file, the Role name must then be suffixed with a number, starting with 1.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="inheritable" type="xsd:boolean" use="optional" default="true">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Is the role required when this ExperimentStep is nested under a Result?  If true, the sample is inherited from the superordinate ExperimentStep.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="ExperimentDataRoleBlueprint" type="ExperimentDataRoleBlueprintType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Definition of characteristics and role that the referenced ExperimentStep plays in the ExperimentStep.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="ExperimentDataRoleBlueprintType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Definition of characteristics and role that the referenced ExperimentStep plays in the ExperimentStep.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
			<xsd:element ref="Documentation" minOccurs="0"/>
		</xsd:sequence>
		<xsd:attribute name="name" type="ShortStringType" use="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Role name used in the ExperimentData(Bulk)Reference element's role attribute.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="experimentStepPurpose" type="PurposeType" use="required"/>
		<xsd:attribute name="modality" type="ModalityType" use="optional" default="required">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Are ExperimentData(Bulk)References with this role required?</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
		<xsd:attribute name="maxOccurs" type="MaxOccursType" use="optional" default="1">
			<xsd:annotation>
				<xsd:documentation>Specifies how many ExperimentData(Bulk)References with this role may exist.</xsd:documentation>
			</xsd:annotation>
		</xsd:attribute>
	</xsd:complexType>
	<xsd:element name="MethodBlueprint" type="MethodBlueprintType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Description of the experimental method used.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:unique name="methodCategoryName">
			<xsd:selector xpath="CategoryBlueprint"/>
			<xsd:field xpath="@name"/>
		</xsd:unique>
	</xsd:element>
	<xsd:complexType name="MethodBlueprintType">
		<xsd:annotation>
			<xsd:documentation>Description of the experimental method used.</xsd:documentation>
		</xsd:annotation>
		<xsd:sequence>
